productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Summer White Shirts
description: CompositionWhite shirt made of 100% cotton, has a cut-away collar with a front buttoned placket, full arm cuff sleeves and a curved hemline  FittingComfort  Wash careonly hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery  Take formal dressing to the next level with this shirt from united colors of benetton. The classic white suits all occasions, and the cotton fabric is sure to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with dark formal pants and leather shoes for a formal look, or with jeans and brown suede shoes for a semi-formal touché .  Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-5'11", Shoulders-18"
